column1:
d400 (d4 + 2d10) = 101-499 - Roll d4 to determine hundreds place, roll 2d10 to determine the tens, and ones place.

4600 (d6 + 2d10) = 101-699 - Same as prior.

d800 (d8 + 2d10) = 101-899 - Same as prior.

d1000 (d10 + 2d10) = 101-1099 - Roll d10 for hundreds or thousands place, roll 2d10 for tens and ones.

d1200 (d12 + 2d10) = 101-1299 - Roll d12 to determine the thousands or hundreds place, roll 2d10 to determine the tens and ones place.
